content: Self-Refine's task-agnostic iterative self-feedback loop can be reframed as a foundational single-perspective base for multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iteration of Self-Refine acts as a distinct inconsistent solving perspective to feed into structured reflection frameworks like Self-Contrast. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra training or labeled data while leveraging the perspective diversity that makes multi-perspective reflection mechanisms effective at reducing blind spots.
